title: Watch_Dogs
notes: Installs Uplay fine but tries to launch the game and gets stuck at a clear loading screen
UPlay just cannot connect to the services.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes:
Need Proton 3.16-4 and create symlinks for libgnutls to install and run Uplay. After Uplay launch let it to install steam client in some dir, than close it. Don't open new steam client, just let Uplay install it. After closing Uplay in your native Steam client launch again Watch Dogs - works flawless, but no sound.

How I created symlinks for libgnutls in my Kubuntu 18.04:

sudo ln -s /usr/lib/i386-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so.30 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnulibgnutls.so.26

sudo ln -s /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so.30 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so.26
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: Create a symlink for libgnutls to steam as seen here: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1757#issuecomment-431571624 Uplay will then work and install a Windows version of Steam -- install it to a random directory. From there Watch Dogs works almost flawlessly except for the fact that there is absolutely no sound.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes:
i fallow the instruction below for gnutls and uplay.
to get the sound working:
first donwload proton_run at https://gist.github.com/SleepProgger/2538c8931c61b752f42cfcf6326e3621
second extract it and run a terminal in the root of the folder and type chmod +x proton_run and ./proton_run 243470 winecfg.
in winecfg application set to windowsxp
in winecfg audio set to pulseaudio and speaker mode multicanal 5.1
wacth dogs works perfectly for me after 3h in game.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: Needs: gnutls symlinks for uPlay (https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/162), ttf-ms-fonts (fix uPlay transparency). uPlay will run Win Steam setup, just install to diff folder (don't launch at end). After that, it will work normally.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: Game worked out of the box (including the UPlay launcher), except the in game sound: no matter what I try, I have no sound at all or distorted sound (tried installing xact, using Pulse Audio or ALSA, setting to Windows XP, ESYNC off). Without sound the game is not reasonably playable IMO.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: After making the symlinks for libgnutls I was able to start the game, but, while there is sound in main menu, there is no sound in the game at all. I tried several tricks to make it work, but without success. Hence the bronze rating.
